title: Specklinia morenoi
taxonomy: Specklinia morenoi is classified as a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Within this family, it is part of the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Epidendreae. This species is further classified within the genus Specklinia, which is a group of small to medium-sized orchids. The classification of Specklinia morenoi is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other orchid species.
